Charging the Power Station
==========================

|PRODUCT_NAME| supports multiple charging methods.

AC Charging
-----------

Connect the AC charging cable to a wall outlet and plug the other end into the
AC input port of the power station.

Solar Charging
--------------

The power station can be charged using compatible solar panels.

.. note::

   Ensure the solar panel voltage and current are within the supported range.

Car Charging
------------

The power station can also be charged through a vehicle's 12V car outlet.

.. tip::

   Car charging may take longer compared with AC charging.
